name: Great Lakes Dredge & Dock CORP
summary: Part I . The terms we, our, ours, us, Great Lakes, GLDD and Company refer to Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation and its subsidiaries. Organization Great Lakes is the largest provider of dredging services in the United States which is complemented with a long history of performing significant international projects. The Company is also fully engaged in expanding its core business into the offshore energy industry. The Company was founded in 1890 as Lydon & Drews Partnership and performed its f...
